purpose: Second-domain corpus for validating the corpus-swappable design of the multi-source RAG pipeline. Mirrors the MAS corpus structure exactly so the existing pipeline can be pointed at IRAS data with zero code changes to the graph, routing, or quality gate logic.

sources.A_vector_store: IRAS e-Tax Guides on corporate income tax, transfer pricing, withholding tax, DTAs, and anti-avoidance — semantic policy/guidance documents
sources.B_sql_database: Tax rates over time, tax instrument metadata, double tax agreement reference data — structured numerical/categorical data
sources.C_web_fallback: Real-time — Budget speeches, recent IRAS rulings, industry commentary

core_corporate_tax.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Tax Framework for Variable Capital Companies
core_corporate_tax.notes: Third edition. Structured by tax type (income tax / GST / stamp duty). Useful for testing multi-section retrieval.

core_corporate_tax.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Tax Exemption for Foreign-Sourced Income
core_corporate_tax.notes: Fifth edition. Cross-references the DTA list — natural multi-source query target.

core_corporate_tax.title: IRAS Explanatory Notes to Form C for Year of Assessment 2025
core_corporate_tax.notes: Procedural admin doc — discursive prose, contrast to the structured guides. Stresses chunking on heterogeneous formats.

core_corporate_tax.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Basic Format of Tax Computation for an Investment Holding Company
core_corporate_tax.notes: Worked-example heavy. Good test for chunking on tabular content.

core_corporate_tax.title: IRAS Webinar Materials: Taxation of Investment Holding Companies (2024)
core_corporate_tax.notes: Slide-deck format. Stresses extraction quality on layout-heavy PDFs.

transfer_pricing.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Transfer Pricing Guidelines (Eighth Edition)
transfer_pricing.notes: Largest doc in corpus. ~190 pages. Annex A has 6 worked examples — chunking strategy must keep them intact. Primary chunking risk.

transfer_pricing.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Tax Computation for an Investment Holding Company Providing Routine Support Services
transfer_pricing.notes: References Annex C of the TP Guidelines — tests cross-document retrieval.

anti_avoidance.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Incorporation of Companies by Medical Professionals and Relevant Tax Implications
anti_avoidance.notes: Section 33 GAAR application. Numbered case studies — good test for example-aware chunking.

anti_avoidance.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Tax Treatment of Gains or Losses from the Sale of Foreign Assets (Section 10L)
anti_avoidance.notes: Substance requirements + GAAR-adjacent. Cross-references Sections 5, 13W, FSIE.

tax_incentives.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Tax Exemption under Section 13(12) for Specified Scenarios, REITs and Qualifying Offshore Infrastructure
tax_incentives.notes: Mix of narrative + worked examples. Has Annex 4 declaration form — should be excluded from chunks if possible.

tax_incentives.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Tax Deduction for Shares Used to Fulfill Obligations under an EEBR Scheme
tax_incentives.notes: Footnote-heavy. Tests handling of inline citations during text extraction.

withholding_tax.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Avoidance of Double Taxation Agreements (Fourth Edition)
withholding_tax.notes: Fourth edition, Jan 2026. Covers MAP procedures, treaty interpretation, PE rules — primary DTA reference. Pairs with CT-002 (FSIE) for multi-source DTA queries.

withholding_tax.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Income Tax: Rights-Based Approach to Characterising Software and Other Payments
withholding_tax.notes: Determines whether software/IP payments are royalties or service fees — directly governs which WHT rate applies under Section 12(6). Central to withholding_tax queries about cross-border IP.

withholding_tax.title: IRAS e-Tax Guide: Determining the Date of Payment or Deemed Payment for the Purpose of Complying with Withholding Tax Obligations
withholding_tax.notes: Compliance guide on timing of WHT obligations — when to withhold, deemed payment rules, late payment penalties. Complements the rates data in tax_rates table.

notes: All URLs verified directly fetchable from iras.gov.sg as of 2026-04-07 via web_fetch (not via the local download script — the local session must re-verify with the browser-UA requests session). The ?sfvrsn= query parameters are CMS cache-busters and can be kept or stripped without affecting download behaviour.
